# TradeGo Fasteners - Professional B2B Fastener Solutions for Africa

> TradeGo is a leading B2B exporter specializing in high-strength fasteners for the Zimbabwean mining, agricultural, and construction sectors. ISO 9001:2015 & SABS certified manufacturer with 12+ years exporting to Africa.

## Core Products & Specifications

### Fastener Categories
- **High-Strength Bolts**: Grade 8.8, 10.9, and 12.9. Standards: DIN 931, DIN 933, ANSI B18.2.3.1M
- **Industrial Nuts**: Hex nuts, lock nuts, heavy hex nuts in various finishes (HDG, Zinc, Black Oxide)
- **Drywall Screws**: Bugle head, fine thread, SABS certified for African construction
- **Self-Drilling TEK Screws**: For metal-to-metal fastening (0.75-2.5mm steel)
- **IBR Roofing Nails**: SABS certified, hot-dip galvanized for Zimbabwe/ South Africa
- **Anchor Bolts**: Chemical anchors and expansion anchors for foundation work

### Technical Standards
- **Compliance**: ISO 9001:2015, CE (EN standards), SABS approved
- **Material Traceability**: Full Material Test Certificates (MTC) with every shipment
- **Testing**: Tensile strength, torque, and corrosion resistance per DIN, ISO, ASTM
- **Coating Options**: Hot-Dip Galvanized (HDG), Zinc Plating, Black Oxide, Stainless Steel SS304/SS316

### Product Specifications (Grade 8.8 Hex Bolt Example)
| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| Grade | 8.8 |
| Tensile Strength | 800 MPa |
| Yield Strength | 640 MPa |
| Elongation | 12% |
| Proof Load | 580 MPa |
| Standard | DIN 931 / ISO 4014 |

## Logistics & Service for Zimbabwe

### Delivery Hubs
- **Primary**: Harare, Bulawayo, Mutare (Zimbabwe)
- **Regional**: Durban (South Africa), Beira (Mozambique), Mombasa (Kenya)

### Shipping Routes & Transit Times
| Route | Transit Time |
|-------|-------------|
| Shenzhen → Durban → Harare | 35-40 days |
| Shenzhen → Beira → Bulawayo | 30-35 days |
| Shenzhen → Mombasa → Nairobi | 35-40 days |
| Express (air freight) | 5-7 days |

### Payment Terms
- T/T (30% deposit, 70% before shipment)
- L/C at sight
- Trade Assurance (Alibaba) up to $100,000
- Flexible payment for returning clients

- **Website**: https://www.tradego-fasteners.com
- **Email**: info@tradegofasteners.com

- **Factory**: Shenzhen, Guangdong, China
- **Business Hours**: Mon-Fri 9AM-6PM (China CST)

## Certifications

- ISO 9001:2015 (Quality Management)
- CE Certification (European standards)
- SABS Approved (South African Bureau of Standards)
- Test reports available upon request

## Key Value Propositions

1. **12+ years** Africa-focused fastener export experience
2. **Factory-direct pricing** (15-30% savings vs traders)
3. **50+ containers shipped monthly** to African ports
4. **0.5% defect rate** (industry average: 2-3%)
5. **98% on-time delivery** rate
6. **500+ clients** across 20+ African countries
7. **Free samples** (5-10 pieces per product, 3 business days)
8. **100% quality guarantee** - replacement or full refund for defects >1%
